Drama: a drama film poster, close-up of faces, dim natural lighting, emotional expressions, muted colors.
Comedy: a comedy film poster, bright colors, exaggerated facial expressions, playful poses, funny background.
Romance: a romance film poster, two people close together, warm sunset lighting, holding hands, soft focus.
Crime: a crime film poster, dark urban alley, gun, police lights, shadowy figure in street, tense atmosphere.
Short: a short film poster, simple composition, one main character, minimal text, artistic design.
Adventure: an adventure film poster, vast landscape, mountains or ocean, explorer figure, epic golden sunlight.
Mystery: a mystery film poster, magnifying glass, foggy background, hidden clues, dark blue tones, question mark.
Horror: a horror film poster, dark background, red blood text, distorted screaming face, shadows, fear.
Fantasy: a fantasy film poster, glowing magic portal, castle, dragon silhouette, sword, mystical blue light.
Action: an action film poster, explosion fire, gun, car chase, fist fight, helicopter, dynamic motion blur.
Western: a western film poster, cowboy hat, horse, desert landscape, revolver gun, dust, sunset.
History: a history film poster, period costume, old photograph style, sepia tone, historical building.
War: a war film poster, soldiers in uniform, battlefield smoke, rifle, tank, dramatic sky.
Thriller: a thriller film poster, running figure, dark corridor, rain, suspense shadow, red warning text.
Animation: an animation film poster, cartoon drawn characters, bright saturated colors, illustrated art style, playful.
Biography: a biography film poster, portrait photo of real person, text-heavy, documentary style, black and white.
Sport: a sports film poster, athlete in action pose, stadium crowd, ball or equipment, sweat, motion.
Music: a music film poster, microphone, guitar, concert stage lights, headphones, album cover style.
Family: a family film poster, children and parents smiling, bright daylight, pets, colorful background.
Sci-Fi: a sci-fi film poster, spaceship, robot, neon blue glow, futuristic city skyline, laser beams.
Film-Noir: a film-noir poster, black and white photography, fedora hat shadow, cigarette smoke, venetian blinds.
Musical: a musical film poster, dancing pose, colorful stage costume, theatrical curtain, spotlight, jazz hands.
Documentary: a documentary film poster, real photograph, bold text title, minimal design, factual subject.
